title: Fable 5 Returns... This Is Big
summary: The video claims Fable 5 may be returning after being pulled for national security reasons. It cites leaked Claude code strings, Amazon Bedrock confirmations, Congressional pressure, and a reported Mythos successor, suggesting government scrutiny and policy negotiations are reshaping availability.
writeup: The video reports that Fable 5, a frontier AI model previously pulled for national security reasons, may be returning. It builds the case from several signals: leaked Claude code strings, Amazon Bedrock confirmations, Congressional pressure, and a reported Mythos successor. The framing connects these to government scrutiny, export controls, and policy negotiations that are reshaping which models stay available.
